---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new connector, capability, or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that the tool doesn't support today? Who hits this
(developer in a PR, security triage, platform/architecture)?

## Proposed solution

What would good look like? If it's a new **connector** (GCP/Azure, GitHub/GitLab,
Snyk, …), which assets/identities/findings would it ingest, and what edges would
it add to the graph?

## Does it serve the wedge?

PerspectiveGraph's core is *attack paths in your pull request*. Bonus points for
explaining how this makes that red/green PR check more accurate or more reachable
(it's fine if it doesn't - say so).

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've tried, or other tools that do (or don't) solve this.
